explanations.1: This sets a variable to 31, which is the ANSI color code for red text in terminal output.
explanations.4: The loop iterates through all arguments passed to this function, with each one temporarily called 'line'.
explanations.5: This uses printf with escape sequences: \e[ starts a formatting command, 1; makes text bold, the number is the color, m ends the command, and \e[0m resets formatting back to normal.
